title: Smooth Wood Products
description: Smoother and more versatile textures for Wooden Fences, Buttons, and more while remaining faithful to original texture.
body:
I have often seen fences retextured to with the stripped log textures in order to give them a smoother appearance and give a more natural look to custom trees. After all, _why would they be made of several horizontal planks anyways_? Since I didn't like the idea of changing plank products to look like logs (which also has a separate color scheme), I made a resource pack to give some wooden objects a _smoother_, more _versatile_ appearance while staying _faithful_ to the color and look of the planks texture using slightly modified versions of the original textures. Modifies the appearance of Wooden Fences, Fence Gates, Wooden Buttons, Tripwire Hooks, and Armor Stands. This pack is compatible with my [Consistent Fence Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-fence-items) resource pack, providing consistent item models for fences. To use both, have this pack selected BELOW the Consistent Fence Items pack. Too smooth for you? Check out my [Better Wood Products](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-wood-products) resource pack, which keeps the dark lines in the texture but realigns them to fit better.
